description.ko: ECHO-0가 보이지 않는 음파를 유형의 빛나는 기하학적 구조와 유체 빛 조각으로 변환하는 정교한 청각 데이터의 시각화입니다.
description.en: A sophisticated representation of auditory data where ECHO-0 transforms invisible sound waves into tangible, glowing geometric architectures and fluid light sculptures.

prompt: Cinematic 3D render of ECHO-0, a futuristic spherical core visualizing sound waves, intricate kinetic geometry made of liquid chrome and neon filaments, cymatics patterns vibrating in mid-air, deep obsidian background, pulsing turquoise and magenta energy, hyper-realistic, 8k resolution, depth of field, sharp focus on crystalline sound structures.
